_cottage.swimVerdict: Direct beach access from lower level. Sandy beach with kayaks and paddleboard included. Campfire on the shore. Long walks on the beach.
Lakeview beachfront with stone collecting. Clean water - not weedy or slimy. Bring water shoes for rocky shore. Great sunset views.
Lakefront with beach under a willow tree. Sandy/stony beach. Outdoor shower. World-class sunsets. Beach varies by season.
Lake view cottage with beach access. Good for families with playful backyard. Cozy evenings by the fire. Beach vacation vibes.
1-minute walk to the lake. Sandy beach. Perfect for families or couples. Modern A-frame design with brand new outdoor sauna.
NO stairs to beach. Beachfront retreat on well-treed private lot. Sandy beaches, historic lighthouse, biking trails, and Lake Huron sunsets. Perfect for families.
Lakefront with floor-to-ceiling windows facing Lake Huron. New stairs added in 2025 to lake access. 80 stairs to water. World-renowned sunsets.
2-minute walk to sandy beach with NO STAIRS. Perfect for mobility issues. Wagon provided for beach chairs. Sandy lakebed.
1-minute walk to rocky beach or 5-minute bike ride to sandy beach. Modern, beautifully updated cottage across from Lake Huron.
Approximately 80 steps down to beach. Sandy/stony lakebed - water shoes recommended. Stunning lakeview deck perfect for gathering.
Lake view and lake access from backyard. Floor-to-ceiling windows with lake views. Hot tub. Kayak, paddleboard & lake mat included.
Direct river access with 2-minute paddle to beach, or short 2-minute walk to sandy beach (no stairs). Modern stylish cottage.
Steps to sandy Lake Huron beach, shallow entry with some stones then sandy, never busy
Lake Huron just around the corner, close to sandy beach
Steps from Point Clark Lighthouse — one of Lake Huron's best sandy beaches
Near Lake Huron with big yard, beach vibes but not lakefront
50 feet of private sandy beach with gentle sloping entry into Georgian Bay. Crystal clear water, excellent for swimming and snorkeling. Views of Meaford Bluffs and Blue Mountains from the cottage.
5-minute walk to beautiful Meaford beaches on Georgian Bay. Multiple beaches within walking distance. Not waterfront but very close.

name: House of Lords - Georgian Bay Waterfront

_cottage.swimVerdict: Flat shoreline with shallow entry into remarkably clear Georgian Bay water. Excellent snorkeling. Swim raft provided. Safe for kids with gradual entry. Crystal clear water typical of the Wiarton/Bruce Peninsula area.
Less than 1-MINUTE WALK to Sauble Beach — 11km of pristine sandy beach on Lake Huron. Warm shallow water, world-class sunsets. One of Ontario's best swimming beaches.
5-minute walk to Sauble Beach's famous 11km sandy shoreline on Lake Huron. Warm, shallow water perfect for families. World-class sunsets.
10-minute walk to Lake Huron's sandy beach, plus minutes from Silver Lake shoreline. Two water bodies to choose from. Beach wagon and chairs provided. 2 kayaks + canoe included for water exploration.

name: Out of the Blue - Family Cottage

_cottage.swimVerdict: 5-minute walk to Port Elgin's beautiful sandy beach on Lake Huron. North Shore Park Splash Pad nearby for kids. Sheltered swimming areas. Stunning sunsets over the lake.
Directly across the road from Miramichi Bay on Lake Huron. Sandy beach access steps away. Located on the Great Lakes Waterfront Trail for walking/biking along the lakeshore.

1-minute walk to Beach Area 4 — one of the best stretches of Wasaga's 14km of sandy shoreline (longest freshwater beach in the world). Warm, shallow Georgian Bay water. Dog-friendly Beach 3 also within walking distance.

Steps from Beach Area 4 on Georgian Bay — 14km of pristine sandy shoreline. Safe family-friendly beach with no public parking on the street (quiet). Kids can play freely. Listen to waves from the front patio.
Sandy beach access via ~90 shared stairs (flights of 6-8 steps with platforms). Shared with sister cottage Shades of Blue.
Directly on Lake Huron waterfront with spacious lot. Double-wide lot backing right onto the water.
Lake access with variable lakebed — sandy or stoney depending on conditions. Sand typically found 3ft out. Good for stone collecting. Not weedy or slimy. Water shoes recommended.
Lake access via approx 45 stairs to beach. Includes kayaks, paddleboard & lake mat for water activities.
Lakefront property designed to take advantage of lake views from every angle — kitchen, fireplace, hot tub, gazebo, and beach. Direct lake view and access.
Lake view and lake access. Exceptional Bayfield beach cottage with stunning lake views inside and out.
Lake view and lake access. Unforgettable sunsets from the property.
Lakefront with lots of beach! Lower sunset deck with seating overlooking lake. Direct lake view and lake access. Paddleboard & lake mat rentals available mid-June to mid-Sept.
Private beach access via short walk down the hill. Uncrowded beach. Parking at beach can be arranged for those who can't manage the incline.
